# orgLimitDefault

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

CRUD operations for OrgLimitDefault records via app CLI

## Usage

```bash
app org-limit-default list
app org-limit-default get --id <value>
app org-limit-default create --name <value> --max <value>
app org-limit-default update --id <value> [--name <value>] [--max <value>]
app org-limit-default delete --id <value>
```

## Examples

### List all orgLimitDefault records

```bash
app org-limit-default list
```

### Create a orgLimitDefault

```bash
app org-limit-default create --name "value" --max "value"
```

### Get a orgLimitDefault by id

```bash
app org-limit-default get --id <value>
```
